visual_description: Two men stand facing each other in a room with wallpaper and wall sconces; one wears a pink plaid shirt and gestures with his hands while looking at the other, who wears a blue plaid shirt and has his arms crossed, turning slightly away. The man in pink appears to be speaking, while the man in blue listens with his back partially turned. A framed picture hangs on the wall behind them.
audio_description: The audio sounds like a man speaking in a neutral tone with a clear voice and moderate pace.
